subcodes.first_line: Glorified be He Who knoweth whatsoever is in the heavens and whatsoever is on the earth. They who have believed in God and in His signs—these are they who shall triumph [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: بسم الله الرحمن الرحیم. سبحان الذی یعلم ما فی السموات و ما فی الارض و ان الذین آمنوا بالله و آیاته فأولئک هم الفائزون
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @recompense; reward for belief; right action, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
